intro: Government and telecommunications entities were the primary targets of surveillance activity covered in six recent reports from mid-April 2026. The private sector and civil-society groups were also affected, with notable incidents in the United states, Iran, and Mexico. The technical landscape included the critical-severity vulnerability CVE-2026-22898, which carries a CVSS score of 8.8. The archive reflects a range of incident severities, comprising three informational reports alongside one critical, one high, and one medium-severity analysis.
